subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: Women in Persia were treated badly in former times by the Muhammadans.... Qurratu'l-'Ayn was one of the greatest and most heroic women
subcodes.subjects: @Tahirih [Qurratu'l-'Ayn], @martyrs and martyrdom, @role and station of women
